shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "react-datepicker selectsRange in-selecting-range filler out-of-month" --limit 5'

/bin/bash -lc 'rg -n "in-selecting-range|selectsRange|isInRange|outside-month|outsideMonth|renderDayContents" src/day.tsx src/month.tsx src/calendar.tsx src/test/day_test.test.tsx src/test/multi_month_test.test.tsx src/test/calendar_test.test.tsx'
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,100p' src/test/day_test.test.tsx && rg -n \"function renderDay|const renderDay|renderDay =\" src/test/day_test.test.tsx src/test/test_utils.ts"
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"function isSameMonth|const isSameMonth|export.*isSameMonth\" src/date_utils.ts && sed -n '1,80p' src/date_utils.ts && sed -n '1140,1205p' src/month.tsx"
/bin/bash -lc 'node_modules/.bin/prettier --write src/day.tsx src/test/day_test.test.tsx && yarn eslint && yarn type-check'
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff --check && git diff --stat && git diff -- src/day.tsx src/test/day_test.test.tsx'

/bin/bash -lc "nmem --json m add \"In react-datepicker, Day.isInSelectingRange must return false for adjacent-month filler cells. Week passes the owning Month's numeric month to every Day, so the selecting-range predicate should guard with isAfterMonth()/isBeforeMonth() before evaluating the date interval. Regression coverage belongs in src/test/day_test.test.tsx and should cover both leading and trailing filler dates.\" -t \"Range preview excludes adjacent-month filler days\" --unit-type learning -l react-datepicker -s codex -i 0.7"

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
